title: Right of use.
doc_html:
CHAPTER 4--RIGHTS OF USE

Art. 639.  Right of use.

The personal servitude of right of use confers in favor of a person a specified use of an estate less than full enjoyment.

Acts 1976, No. 103, §1.
doc_text:
CHAPTER 4--RIGHTS OF USE
Art. 639.  Right of use.
The personal servitude of right of use confers in favor of a person a specified use of an estate less than full enjoyment.
Acts 1976, No. 103, §1.
